The '''Galactic Alliance Army''' was the [[Army/Legends|ground forces branch]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]]. Formed from the remnants of the [[New Republic Army]],<ref name="Dark Nest III" /> the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] Army was composed of [[Galactic Alliance Infantry Trooper]]s, [[Galactic Alliance Infantry Scout]]s,<ref name="Legacy Era" /> and [[Galactic Alliance officer]]s.<ref name="Dark Nest III" />

The Army continued to exist until [[127 ABY]] during the traumatic [[Sith–Imperial War]] which saw the Galactic Alliance's [[Sith–Imperial War|defeat]] by the [[Fel Empire]] and their [[One Sith]] allies. The Galactic Alliance Army was mostly disbanded following its surrender, although some units were absorbed by the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. However, a small contingent continued to exist within the [[Core Fleet|Galactic Alliance Core Fleet]], under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gar Stazi]], where they conducted hit-and-run attacks similar to those employed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="Legacy Era" />
